headline: Scotiabank Maintains Sector Outperform on Public Storage, Raises Price Target to $342
summary: Scotiabank  analyst Nicholas Yulico   maintains Public Storage (NYSE:PSA) with a Sector Outperform and raises the price target from $340 to $342.

headline: REITs: Cheap, Unloved, And Finally Showing Life
summary: REITs in 2026 are defying rising yields as fundamentals, M&A, NOI growth, and dividend hikes drive returns.
